markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Design an agentic system for generating long-form articles.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Narrative-First Design:** The system's foundation is a "Tendency Matching Engine" that analyzes client documents to define a core narrative using the "Four Tendencies" framework. This provides a concrete, measurable standard for all subsequent content generation.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1056.0)
  - [**Adversarial Validation:** To combat LLM hallucinations, a "Bug Engineer" agent will be used. This agent's sole purpose is to find flaws in the system's output, forcing the main agents to improve their defensive posture and factual accuracy.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
  - [**Human-in-the-Loop Workflow:** The system is designed for internal agency use. A "Content Expert" persona acts as the human interface, translating client strategy into specific topics and audiences for the AI to execute.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
  - [**Modular Architecture:** The design uses a "middle-out" approach, building from core services (e.g., `DocService`, `FrameworkService`) orchestrated by a `TendencyMatchingController` to ensure a robust and scalable foundation.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)

## Topics

### Problem Definition & Success Criteria

  - [**Goal:** Build an agentic system to produce long-form draft articles for clients.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [**Key Requirements:**](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Factual Correctness:** A primary challenge due to noisy/contradictory sources.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=544.0)
      - [**Brand Voice Adherence:** Must follow client-specific guidelines.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
      - [**Audience Utility:** Content must be useful to the intended audience.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [**Minimal Human Edits:** A key cost-saving objective.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=583.0)
  - [**Context:** The system is an internal tool for an agency (GrowthX), not a client-facing product. Agency editors and engineers manage the inputs and outputs.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=862.0)

### Solution: Narrative-First Design

  - [**Core Insight:** The most ambiguous requirement ("useful to the intended audience") can be solved by first defining a concrete client narrative.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
  - [**Framework:** The "Four Tendencies" framework (Gretchen Rubin) provides a structured way to classify a company's personality and communication style (Upholder, Rebel, Obliger, Questioner).](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [**Process:**](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
    1.  [**Corpus Collection:** Gather client documents (website, blogs, etc.).](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1047.0)
    2.  [**Narrative Analysis:** A "Tendency Matching Engine" analyzes the corpus to determine the client's dominant tendency.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
    3.  [**Validation:** The resulting narrative thesis is presented to the client for validation, ensuring alignment before content generation begins.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)

### System Architecture & Workflow

  - [**Architecture:** A "middle-out" approach, starting with core services and building outward.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1285.0)
      - [**`DocService`:** Manages document retrieval from a `CustomerCorpusRepo`.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
      - [**`FrameworkService`:** Contains the logic for applying the "Four Tendencies" framework.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1555.0)
      - [**`TendencyMatchingController`:** Orchestrates the narrative analysis workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [**Workflow:**](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2010.0)
    1.  [**Content Expert Input:** An agency editor defines a `Topic` (thesis) and `Target Audience` for an article.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)
    2.  **Research Pipeline:** For topics outside the client corpus, a research agent executes a plan:
          - [Pull data → Analyze → Vectorize → Store in a knowledge graph.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2703.0)
          - [**Rationale:** Knowledge graphs are faster and more precise than vector databases for specific data retrieval.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2729.0)
    3.  [**Article Generation:** A separate agent uses the validated narrative, topic, audience, and research to draft the article.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2564.0)

### Quality Assurance: Adversarial Agents

  - [**Problem:** LLM hallucinations (e.g., fake links, incorrect facts) are a major risk.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2773.0)
  - [**Solution:** Implement a "Bug Engineer" agent.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
      - [**Function:** This agent's sole purpose is to find flaws and break the system, acting as a malicious actor.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
      - [**Rationale:** This adversarial approach forces the main content-generating agents to develop a more robust, defensive posture, improving factual accuracy and reliability.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=2907.0)
  - [**Example:** The "Overwatch" system, a personal project for managing AI agents, was shown as a proof-of-concept for this adversarial design.](https://fathom.video/share/9QxYP-1AgYRz3FTXhEivkxqTVWx1nBwK?tab=summary&timestamp=3028.0)
